creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
I hit this as well in a jail (12.3-RELEASE-p6) and the tentative fix seems easy for me:
root@deblndw013x2j:/usr/ports/dns/bind-tools
# vim ../bind918/Makefile
## line 44, append 'gmake' to USES
root@deblndw013x2j:/usr/ports/dns/bind-tools
# nsupdate -V
nsupdate 9.18.5
root@deblndw013x2j:/usr/ports/dns/bind-tools
# stat $(which nsupdate)
15065098060456364396 316766 -r-xr-xr-x 1 root wheel 18446744073709551615 66248 "Aug 22 10:52:37 2022" "Aug 22 10:52:37 2022" "Aug 22 10:56:44 2022" "Aug 22 10:52:37 2022" 66560 81 0x800 /usr/local/bin/nsupdate

Can this Make be fixed until upstream has a better solution?
